ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-28-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MTN FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/12/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 6/2/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. ANY FILMS IN POSSISION OF PLAINTIFF TO BE PROVIDED TO BERY & BERY BY 3/24/06. PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE, BY FAX, AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: VERA MU; REPORTER: DIANA PADILLA, CSR 	975 (206)
